hero.title: Discover.
hero.subtitle:
Cambodia’s trusted marketplace
for local businesses and buyers.
Trey Visai connects verified
Cambodian merchants with customers
across the country —
making it easier to find,
trust, and support local.

about.title: Who We Are
about.description:
Trey Visai is a verified business discovery and membership platform built for Cambodia’s vibrant small business economy.
We bridge the gap between local merchants and the customers who are looking for them.
about.missionDescription: To empower Cambodian small businesses with visibility, credibility, and community — so every merchant, whether chamber-registered or independent, has a place to be found and trusted.

merchant.title: For Merchants
merchant.getListed: Get listed and verified on a trusted platform
merchant.showcaseProducts: Showcase your products, location, and contact information
merchant.buildReputation: Build your reputation with a recognised member profile

buyer.title: For Buyers
buyer.findMerchants: Discover local businesses quickly and easily
buyer.discoverProducts: Browse verified merchants you can trust
buyer.supportLocal: Find businesses by category, location, or name

contact.haveQuestions: Have questions or want to join Trey Visai as a merchant?
